games.name: 0 A.D.
games.description: Free, open-source real-time strategy game set in ancient times. Build civilizations, manage economies, and command armies.

games.name: SuperTuxKart
games.description: Open-source kart racing game starring Tux and friends. Lightweight, controller-friendly, runs well on Intel iGPUs.

games.name: Battle for Wesnoth
games.description: Turn-based tactical RPG/strategy hybrid with a huge fantasy campaign library, entirely free and open source.

games.name: Warzone 2100
games.description: Post-apocalyptic real-time strategy with base building, tech trees, and unit design. Fully open source.

games.name: Xonotic
games.description: Fast-paced, free arena FPS built on the Darkplaces engine. Runs smoothly on low-end Intel hardware.

games.name: Teeworlds
games.description: Tiny, fast 2D multiplayer shooter/platformer hybrid. Extremely lightweight — under 500 MB installed.

games.name: Extreme Tux Racer
games.description: Lightweight downhill racing game. Tux on a sled, classic arcade fun, minimal system requirements.

games.name: Dungeon Crawl Stone Soup
games.description: Classic roguelike dungeon crawler. Deep RPG mechanics in a tiny, terminal-friendly package.
